quality_intent: The direction review selects the next AOF frontier from executed runtime evidence in a falsifiable form.
risk: A wrong review opens v5.1 toward feature expansion instead of enforcement, leaving self-approval unsolved under new layers.
loss_boundary: A v5.1 release claim standing before human council ratifies this review would violate AOF discipline.
uncertainty_note: Structural defects are measured facts; the prioritization of LP-7 vs LP-9 is inference without operating data.

governance_trigger.trigger_condition: self_judgment is true: reviewer authored and judged the same review
governance_trigger.required_action: Human council ratifies, rejects, or reframes this direction review and the v5.1 theme before any v5.1 release claim
